📊 Alert Thresholds

          
When to show increase / decrease signals

          

          

          
NPT > KPI×(1+inc%) → Increase
NPT < KPI×(1-dec%) → Reduce
Otherwise → Optimal

Maxicare Children Hospital
Reference Standards

      
📚 Nursing Staffing Reference Standards
International benchmarks for nurse-to-patient ratios — compiled from TJC, NNU, California Law, and peer-reviewed literature (2023–2026).

      

        
👩‍⚕️ Nurse-to-Patient Ratios by Department
International standards — CA Law, NNU, TJC 2026

        
DEPARTMENTRATIOCA LAWNNUINTERNATIONALMCH KPI (NPT)

          
OPD1:50—1:501:501.3 hrs/case

          
ER1:3–1:41:41:31:3–43.5 hrs/case

          
General Ward1:5–1:61:51:41:5–611.5 hrs/case

          
ICU1:1–1:21:21:21:1–224.0 hrs/case

          
NICU1:1–1:21:21:11:18.0 hrs/case

          
CCU1:2—1:21:26.0 hrs/case

          
OR/CSSD/GI1:11:11:12/table0.028 hrs/case

        

      

      

        
🏥 TJC Goal 12 — 2026
National Performance Goal
"Hospital is adequately staffed to meet patient needs"
Nurse executives accountable for staffing
Measurable KPIs required
Min 8 consecutive RN hrs/day
Licensed nurse on duty 24/7
Effective Jan 2026 · Source: AACN 2025

        
⚙️ NPT Formula
Nurse Productivity Time
GRANDNPT Formula
NPT = Total Hours ÷ Cases
🔴 NPT > KPI×1.2 → Increase nurses
🟡 Within ±15–20% → Maintain
🟢 NPT < KPI×0.85 → Reduce/reassign

        
🔬 Research Evidence
Impact of staffing on outcomes
+7–8% mortality risk
per extra patient per nurse (2021)
89% nurse shortage reports
ANF Survey 2022
27.1% RN turnover
NSI Report 2022

🔗 Connect to Google Sheets

    
Link this system to your Google Sheet for automatic sync


    

      📋 Sheet Details:

      Sheet ID: 1ZhzV8CV9Cn9Tp8ihPuaVV1DvcYpM7ZdfFYG4emu4c7Y

      Sheet Tab: Productivity
    


    

      
📌 Setup Steps:

      

        
1Open your Google Sheet → Extensions → Apps Script

        
2Paste the Apps Script code (copy from Admin Panel → Sheets Sync)

        
3Deploy → New Deployment → Web App → Execute as Me → Anyone

        
4Copy the Web App URL and paste below

      

    


    

      
    

    
Paste the URL from Step 4 above
